items.name: Starlight Blade : Korblox
items.description: Starlight Blade: Korblox is a formidable and mystical weapon forged from the essence of starlight and the dark, ancient power of the Korblox. This blade is designed for those who seek to harness the cosmic brilliance of the stars and the arcane might of the Korblox, making it a weapon of unparalleled power and mystery.
